title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 230.215 - Clerk to certify returns
text:
230.215.  Clerk to certify returns. — The clerk of the county commission shall record the abstract at length upon the records of the county commission of the county, and shall certify the abstract to the secretary of state.
(L. 1971 H.B. 105 § 4, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971)
